name: Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean mushrooms and separate caps from stems.
2. Slice half of the mushroom caps crosswise into 1/8-inch slices.
3. Chop the stems and remaining caps.
4. Melt two tablespoons butter in a skillet, sauté sliced caps until lightly colored (about five minutes), then remove from the skillet.
5. Add another two tablespoons butter to the skillet, sauté chopped mushrooms and shallots until just tender (about 10 minutes).
6. Combine the cooked mushroom mixture with milk in a saucepan. Season with salt and pepper.
7. Simmer for 20-25 minutes.
8. Beat egg yolks until light and lemon-colored.
9. Whisk in cream, adding hot soup mixture to the egg-cream mix two tablespoons at a time.
10. Blend the egg mixture into the remaining soup, pouring slowly while continuously beating.
11. Add sherry and heat through without boiling.
